name: ml-automation
description: Mercado Libre operations from Codex, including secure local photo uploads for listings.

interface.longDescription: Connect Mercado Libre, review sales and listings, prepare controlled drafts, and upload listing photos from this Mac without exposing marketplace tokens.
defaultPrompt: Review my latest Mercado Libre sales
Create a paused listing using these photos
Compare prices for this product in Mercado Libre
